programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.
programme.sub-title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Every year the Pantanal is drowned by immense floods, and then suffer severe drought. Yet, while people struggle, the Pantanal hosts some of the greatest gatherings of animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: The Andes: World in the Clouds
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent. They include some of the highest peaks outside the Himalayas.
programme.sub-title: The Andes: World in the Clouds

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits
programme.desc: The Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India. he Himalayas' rugged highlands offer little direct refuge to humans, in the shadow below, over a billion people in India rely on the mountains for survival.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it has been inhabited for thousands of years, by people as well as animals, and shows no sign of losing popularity with either.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
programme.desc: It's home to some of the world's most iconic animals  including the African great apes.
programme.sub-title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

programme.title: A Most Violent Year
programme.desc: In 1981 NYC, an immigrant (Oscar Isaac) and his family try to expand their business as rampant violence and corruption drag them in and threaten to destroy all they have built.

programme.title: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: A father becomes worried when a local gangster befriends his son in the Bronx in the 1960s.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A young woman leaves Ireland to find her boyfriend in England, and while there is helped by a man hiding unsettling secrets.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Wolf Boy
programme.desc: Starring Chloë Sevigny and Eve Hewson. In the vein of Little Miss Sunshine, with a modern day fairy-tale surrealism that fans of Tim Burton will love.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century: Smuggle out millions of dollars in worn-out currency headed for a Federal Reserve shredder every day.

programme.title: Bride of the Monster
programme.desc: Horror cinema icons Bela Lugosi and Tor Johnson star in this Ed Wood classic as the crazed Dr. Vornoff and his beastly assistant Lobo.

programme.title: Lost Continent
programme.desc: A military team sent to search for a lost rocket ends up trapped on a mountain inhabited by dinosaurs in Lost Continent.

programme.title: Swamp Diamonds
programme.desc: An undercover police woman infiltrates a group of hardened female criminals who plan to break out of prison and retrieve diamonds from a swamp.

programme.title: The Black Scorpion
programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion.

programme.title: Red Zone Cuba
programme.desc: An escaped convict and his two pals take part in the Bay of Pigs invasion, then return home with a plan to get rich.

programme.title: Jungle Goddess
programme.desc: Jungle Goddess: An heiress stranded in Africa is made queen of the jungle in the feature film and Bela Lugosi stars in the short The Phantom Creeps.

programme.title: The Brute Man
programme.desc: Rondo Hatton plays a disfigured man, a/k/a “The Creeper,” who hunts down and kills the people responsible for his deformity.

programme.title: Indestructible Man
programme.desc: In Indestructible Man, a violent criminal named Butcher Benson is executed and becomes indestructible when he’s brought back to life. Butcher seeks revenge against those who caused his execution.

programme.title: The Unearthly
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates havoc when an experiment to stop the aging process goes awry.

programme.title: Racket Girls
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon (played by Neil Connery, brother of Sean), the brother of a secret agent, combats villain Thair Beta.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Schwampbillies / Remember Fort Sunny Bottom
programme.desc: When McGee, Gretchen and Squirt find themselves lost deep in the schwamp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre
programme.desc: A heat wave forces McGee to sneak a dab of Sawyer's anti-sweat cream. After trying to cheer up Armand, McGee creates a s'more so big, it topples and coats him in delicious goo.
programme.sub-title: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Duh'Rehka / Chore Leave
programme.desc: While chasing his gopher-nemesis, Sawyer gets zapped into his brain bin and emerges super smart!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler
programme.desc: The Campers find a time travelling clock on the beach!
programme.sub-title: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bird Brains / The Real Vincent
programme.desc: Squirt is eager to assist his idol, Dr. Sapstein on his latest quest for the rare mocker bird.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Messy Bessie / Nanny Num Nums
programme.desc: The campers build a race car to help Sawyer relive his pro-racing days.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch
programme.desc: When the campers try to reclaim their stolen Lakebottom items.
programme.sub-title: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity
programme.desc: The campers track down a UFO inhabited by an alien from the planet Squipiter.
programme.sub-title: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force
programme.desc: When a hulking were-chicken stalks the camp, McGee must lead the hunt to prove his innocence.
programme.sub-title: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.
programme.sub-title: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths
programme.desc: When Squirt's stinky underwear is washed in toxic cleanser, the gitch comes alive.
programme.sub-title: Late Afternoon of the Living Gitch / Mindsuckers from the Depths

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Fright Club / Bottomdome
programme.desc: The campers discover an enchanted flashlight.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home
programme.desc: The Campers and Buttsquat come across an ancient pyramid inhabited by mummy's.
programme.sub-title: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch
programme.desc: McGee accidentally summons Percy, a ghost with a very 'fiery' personality.
programme.sub-title: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower
programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.
programme.sub-title: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.
programme.sub-title: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Buttsquat must beat Haggis MacJockstrap in golf!
programme.sub-title: Golfadoom / There is Something About Mamba

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Jaws of Old Toothy / Arachnattack
programme.desc: When Sawyer closes the beach because of a giant fish, McGee vows to rid the lake of "Old Toothy".

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt get super fantastic mega powers!
programme.sub-title: The Superfantastic Mega-Buds / It Came From My Nose

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Itchy Witchy Pizza Project / Breakout From Buttvault B

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Tooth Troll / Hive and Seek
programme.desc: Squirt is captured by a Tooth Troll!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal
programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.
programme.sub-title: Meet The Gretch's Parents / Now with 100% More Portal

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run
programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotizes the Bottom Dwellers.
programme.sub-title: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Mc Crossroads / Lucky Duck

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!
programme.sub-title: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Big Top Terror / Slimal Fear
programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the clown who vows to destroy the campers.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood
programme.desc: McGee tries to save Camp Lakebottom from being overtaken by the Grim Camper.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Butt-Squad / You Sank My Battle-Squirt!
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: MythBusters: Upfront Demolition Derby Special
programme.desc: When a bus is moving at over 50 miles per hour, will moving passengers to the inside of the turn keep the bus from flipping? Will a car dropped from 4,000 feet fall faster than a speeding car?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 163
programme.desc: Is it more difficult to escape from a sinking car that flips upside down than from one that remains right-side up?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 125
programme.desc: Can a person swim faster in syrup than in water? Can two targets be hit with one shot by splitting a bullet on an axe blade? Can a steel door be blown open by the gunpowder from six bullets?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 44
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can two semi-trucks collide head-on and completely crush a compact car? Can vodka cure foot odor or bad breath?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 175
programme.desc: Can a person dodge a bullet after it has been fired at him? Can a fall into water inflict the same injuries as one onto pavement from the same height?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 205
programme.desc: Can you cook a full holiday meal on the engine of a running car? Does the tryptophan in turkey make you sleepy? Is it easy to confuse the taste of unusual meat with chicken?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 202
programme.desc: Can certain sound frequencies persuade people that an area is haunted? Is it really possible to smell fear? Is it really as easy to move and bury a dead body as it is in the movies?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 88
programme.desc: Myths tested: Do birds flying in a trailer cause the trailer to become lighter? Will a boat crashing into a channel marker cleave itself in half?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 179
programme.desc: Will a super-sized Newton's cradle work? Can the weight of a bird be enough to tip a teetering car off of a cliff?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 160
programme.desc: Does a certain 1970s sports car become more aerodynamic if the body is turned backwards? Can a surfboard be launched through the windscreen of a car and be lethal, like in the movie "Lethal Weapon 2?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 116
programme.desc: Are two interlaced phone books impossible to pull apart? Can a shark be blown up like it was in "Deep Blue Sea?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 226
programme.desc: Can you bob for an apple during a 100-foot bungee jump? Can you really play tennis on an airplane wing mid-flight?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 208
programme.desc: Can man beat machine in a 30-foot, standing-start sprint? Can a driver lose 10lbs during a race? Can the suction created by a speeding car rip loose a manhole cover during a street race?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 98
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a ninja deflect a bullet with his palm? Can a person breathe from a car tire underwater? Will an RFID chip explode in an MRI scanner?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 91
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a big rig's tire explode with deadly force? Can fuel be saved by tailgating a semi-trailer truck? Can a car be driven onto a truck's extended ramp at highway speeds?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 166
programme.desc: Can mirrors be used to make a death ray? Is it possible to make a moving SUV flip end over end by punching down on the hood, like in the film "Hellboy?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 14
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a marching battalion take down a bridge? How many bacteria reside on a toothbrush? Is it possible to water ski behind a rowing eight?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Seperating Platform Transfer, Underwater Cage Escape, Siphon Dump Transfer, Jet Ski Launch
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.
programme.sub-title: Seperating Platform Transfer, Underwater Cage Escape, Siphon Dump Transfer, Jet Ski Launch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Rolling Flag Snag, Sand Crab Panning, Suspended Car Rotisserie
programme.desc: Contestants will stand on a car suspended over the water by a crane and more in this exciting episode.
programme.sub-title: Rolling Flag Snag, Sand Crab Panning, Suspended Car Rotisserie

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submerged Tubes, Blind Leech Wall, Suspended Log Roll
programme.desc: A blindfolded contestant will be guided by their partner's verbal commands to a tank filled with leeches. Contestants will also stand on a tube being suspended in the air from a crane.
programme.sub-title: Submerged Tubes, Blind Leech Wall, Suspended Log Roll

programme.title: Fear Factor: Extreme Helicopter Rings, Bug Ropes, Inverted Vacuum
programme.desc: Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes and more in this exciting, revolting episode.
programme.sub-title: Extreme Helicopter Rings, Bug Ropes, Inverted Vacuum

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dingy Net Grab, Walk The Plank, Turkey Feast, Under Boat Flag Grab
programme.desc: Contestants will face wild stunts in and out of water as well as a nasty Thanksgiving dinner: Fear Factor style.
programme.sub-title: Dingy Net Grab, Walk The Plank, Turkey Feast, Under Boat Flag Grab

programme.title: Fear Factor: Sinking Room Escape, Santa's Worst Nightmare, Pipe Ramp Roof Slide
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound to a chair suspended over the water. Then, dressed in a dog bite protection suit, contestants must climb out of a chimney and face Santa's worst Christmas ever in this special holiday episode.
programme.sub-title: Sinking Room Escape, Santa's Worst Nightmare, Pipe Ramp Roof Slide

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tarzan Semi To Semi, Fear Factor Donut Shop, Falling Beam Maze
programme.desc: Contestants stand on top of moving trucks, then play a game to determine how many disgusting donuts they will have to eat.
programme.sub-title: Tarzan Semi To Semi, Fear Factor Donut Shop, Falling Beam Maze

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Couples Hang, Tuna Transfer
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under helicopters. In another, each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Double Eat & Yank, Gross Catapult
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, the contestants will stand at a podium on the roof of a 5 story building. The first contestant loads a piece of cow stomach onto a catapult, which will then launch the stomach down to their partner.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Blind Driving Race To Truck,Double Tunnel Flush
programme.desc: A male contestant's head is placed through a hole cut into the bottom of a slightly angled sewer pipe with his arms shackled around the outside of the pipe, among other exciting stunts.
programme.sub-title: Blind Driving Race To Truck,Double Tunnel Flush

programme.title: Fear Factor: Weighted Ski Boot Rescue, Block Head
programme.desc: Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads will be placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats. In another stunt, one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above water wearing weighted boots.
programme.sub-title: Weighted Ski Boot Rescue, Block Head

programme.title: Fear Factor: Fear Factor Triathlon, Electric Maze
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Train Lean and Grab, Gross Gorge
programme.desc: In one couples' stunt, each contestant will stand on a beam suspended in the air off the sides of a train box car. Then, in a banquet room, couples will feed each other as much disgusting food as they can.
programme.sub-title: Train Lean and Grab, Gross Gorge

programme.title: Fear Factor: Boat Helicopter Truck Car Jump,Bullfrog Coffin
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will ride on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. The male contestant will be placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.
programme.sub-title: Boat Helicopter Truck Car Jump,Bullfrog Coffin

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Rope Transfer,Tumbler Cage,Gross Obstacle Course,Up & Over Car Ramp
programme.desc: A rope will be suspended between two helicopters. Contestants will be standing in a tall cage. Contestants must discover a key to a box of worms', which will be transferred onto a scale.
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Rope Transfer,Tumbler Cage,Gross Obstacle Course,Up & Over Car Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submerged Car Rotisserie, Fear Factor Sushi Bar, Wall Sweeper
programme.desc: Contestant is locked by their waist to the drivers seat and wrist to the steering wheel. Contestants determine the quantity and variety of Fear Factor Sushi they will have to eat. A six-inch wide beam will be sticking out perpendicular from a roof top.
programme.sub-title: Submerged Car Rotisserie, Fear Factor Sushi Bar, Wall Sweeper

programme.title: Fear Factor: Helicopter Dual Drop, Yo Yo Tank, Cattle Trench, Semi To Tanker Truck
programme.desc: Contestants will be seated in a helicopter and hang directly under the skids. One of the partners will be dangling by their ankle.
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Dual Drop, Yo Yo Tank, Cattle Trench, Semi To Tanker Truck

programme.title: Fear Factor: Houdini Hang w/ Car Slide & Pyro, Fear Factor Cocktail Bar, Rope Traverse and Toss
programme.desc: Fear Factor goes to Vegas! One stunt begins with a contestant hanging in mid-air with their wrists and ankles bound. In another stunt, contestants consume sickening cocktails.
programme.sub-title: Houdini Hang w/ Car Slide & Pyro, Fear Factor Cocktail Bar, Rope Traverse and Toss

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Yukon
programme.desc: When thunderstorms and a shaking engine threaten a DC-3 charter to Whitehorse, Joe pulls out all the stops to get the passengers to their destination. Patient C-46 co-pilot Scott Blue finally gets his crack at the DC-4.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: British Invasion
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes. The father-son duo makes a great team.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Under New Management
programme.desc: Joe hires outsider Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey. Gord and Sean's DC-3 delivery mission to the High Arctic goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Dambusters
programme.desc: Buffalo gets into the stunt flying business when veteran pilot Arnie flies the DC-4 for the re- enactment scene of a famous WWII bombing raid. A routine C-46 flight becomes dangerous when a hole in the plane's aging exhaust system sets off the fire alarm.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Chuck Walks
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits. Joe clashes with the maintenance department when a series of delays puts the sale of an old Canso waterbomber in jeopardy.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Gear Up, Gear Down
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over. Devan, Ian and Jimmy deal with a hydraulic fluid leak in the C-46 on the valley run.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage, Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul. Cory leads a rescue mission to retrieve an abandoned C-46 and Mikey escapes to Ottawa for a birthday joyride in a fighter jet.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Power Struggle
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck. Kelly plans her Mexican wedding, but Jynelle's sudden resignation leaves her in the lurch.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Top of the World
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and Duane to work things out. Hay River rampie Tyler is on the fast track to a co-pilot seat, but first has to prove his flying ability to Buffalo's new chief pilot, Justin.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes. Larry, a rookie rampie, makes a near fatal error while training on the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract. Young DC-3 co-pilot Graeme sees his chance to move up to a bigger plane disappear when he falls out of favour with Joe.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46. New co-pilot Tyler faces the ultimate test - flying the sked with Joe.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Dark Skies
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes within a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety, which is why he only trusts himself to perform a dangerous-looking DC-3 stunt landing for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac. City girl Christine moves to Yellowknife to give the unglamorous rampie life a shot.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 1
programme.desc: When Luna's plan to free Ancient Fairy Dragon falls apart, Regulus must come to her rescue in order to save her and the Spirit World from Zeman's minus curse.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 2
programme.desc: Carly sets out hoping to uncover the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon, but after digging up some damaging dirt on the Arcadia Movement, she soon finds herself squaring off in a psychic duel with Sayer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Spider, Part 1
programme.desc: Sayer signs up for a Shadow Duel against a Dark Signer who's out for revenge while Akiza agrees to battle a dark and sinister supermodel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Spider, Part 2
programme.desc: As the Dark Signer double duel draws to a climactic close, Carly and Misty unfold a catastrophic card combo that could send Akiza and Sayer to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 1
programme.desc: After Akiza falls into a state of unconsciousness, her father turns to Yusei in a last ditch effort to wake his beloved daughter from her catatonic condition.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Signers presses on, Yusei turns to his trusty Stardust Dragon in an effort to keep the power of Akiza's Black Rose Dragon at bay.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 3
programme.desc: With Yusei, Jack, Akiza and Luna all gathered together, Director Goodwin seizes the moment and decides to shed some light on the dark and formidable foes the four Signers will soon be battling.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 4
programme.desc: In an effort to rid the Satellite Sector of the Dark Signers, Crow ventures out and challenges a sinister looking sneak to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 1
programme.desc: Crow challenges the newest member of the Dark Signers to a Turbo Duel, but before Crow's Blackwings can even take flight, his opponent unleashes an aerial assault of his own.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 2
programme.desc: As the sky-high battle between Crow and Greiger heats up, Crow looks to elevate his game in order to ground Greiger's aerial attacks before they send him to the Netherworld forever.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Whale of a Ride, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Crow turns to his feathered friends in a last ditch effort to take out Greiger's Earthbound Immortal. Can Crow and his Blackwing's rise to the occasion?
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Score to Settle, Part 1
programme.desc: Haunted by the memories of his last battle with Kalin, Yusei looks to bury the past by agreeing to duel his former friend in a rematch. Can Yusei defeat Kalin and seal the tower that this Dark Signer is guarding?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Score to Settle, Part 2
programme.desc: As the rematch between Kalin and Yusei continues, Yusei must find a way to out-think and out-maneuver the dark power of Kalin's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Destiny's Will, Part 1
programme.desc: Roman challenges Yusei to a Shadow Duel at the site of the original Ener-D Reactor. Meanwhile, Director Goodwin decides to make an unexpected visit to the Satellite Sector to settle some unfinished business he has with his Dark Signer brother.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Destiny's Will, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Roman rages on, Roman takes a time out to reveal the truth behind the original Ener-D Reactor's meltdown and the role Yusei's father played.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Shadows of Doubt, Part 1
programme.desc: Jack agrees to Turbo Duel Carly in an effort to defeat the darkness that has taken control of her. Can Jack rid the evil that has come to possess this one-time roving reporter?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Shadows of Doubt, Part 2
programme.desc: Jack kicks his duel into overdrive and summons his Red Dragon Archfiend in a desperate attempt to free Carly from the Dark Signers' control.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Truth and Consequences, Part 1
programme.desc: Hoping to finally find out the whereabouts of her long-lost brother, Misty challenges Akiza to a Shadow Duel in a maze of mirrors.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Truth and Consequences, Part 2
programme.desc: After unlocking Akiza's psychic powers, Sayer sets his sights on using them to get even with the Dark Signers for destroying the Arcadia Movement.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei, Jack and Crow face off against Goodwin in the ultimate Shadow Duel showdown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 2
programme.desc: With the safety of the world hanging in the balance, Yusei, Jack and Crow look to tip the scales in their favor by setting their sights on Goodwin's Earthbound Immortal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points running on empty, Yusei looks to rev it up one last time in order to defeat Goodwin and save the world from the destructive powers of the King of the Netherworld!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A New Threat: Part I
programme.desc: A mysterious new threat arrives on the scene in New Domino City, forcing Yusei to take to the streets and track down a rogue Turbo Duelist known as The Ghost.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei must figure out a way to take down Ghost's Meklord Emperor Wisel before Wisel's special ability throws his game and his runner into a tailspin.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Lessons Learned
programme.desc: When Vice Chancellor Rudolph Heitmann threatens to expel all the members of Leo and Luna's class from Duel Academy, Yusei attempts to teach the teacher a valuable lesson by challenging the Vice Chancellor to a duel to keep his friends in school.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Trash Talk
programme.desc: When Crow is asked to convince an old friend of Martha's to move into her retirement home, Crow decides to tackle the task by challenging the old man to a trash-talking junkyard duel. Can Crow convince the old man to relocate?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Duel with Interest
programme.desc: When a loan shark starts sinking his teeth into New Domino City, Jack decides to reel in this money-grubbing menace for good by putting his most prized possessions on the line in a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Wicked Spirits
programme.desc: When Leo and Luna decide to go exploring a nearby forest rumored to be haunted by wicked spirits, they soon discover that the rumors are all too real when a mysterious boy traps Luna in his house and challenges Leo to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: French Twist: Part I
programme.desc: Yusei wakes up to find himself trapped in the back of a big rig with a bump on his head and no way out. After a mysterious tip leads Akiza to Yusei's location, the two friends soon find themselves Turbo Dueling an unfamiliar foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: French Twist: Part II
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Sherry races on, Sherry reveals some shocking secrets about the upcoming World Racing Grand Prix. Meanwhile, Akiza begins to gain a new understanding and appreciation for Turbo Dueling while riding shotgun to Yusei.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Synchro Straits
programme.desc: Before heading out to the event of the year - The World Racing Grand Prix Gala - Yusei challenges Jack to a Turbo Duel in the hopes of finding a new dueling strategy that doesn't involve the use of Synchro Monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Synchro Solution
programme.desc: A mysterious duelist named Vizor offers to show Yusei a new dueling strategy known as The Synchro Solution.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Acceleration
programme.desc: Akiza goes to get her Turbo Dueling license, but before she can drive off into the sunset, she first has to out-duel, out-maneuver and out-smart one of Sector Security's finest for her final exam.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Syd is Vicious
programme.desc: After a string of Duel Runner thefts has New Domino City on high alert, Jack Atlas decides to take justice into his own hands and ventures out in search of those responsible.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part I
programme.desc: When a mysterious new student gives Luna a-one-of-a-kind Duel Board, Leo, trusting his instincts, steps up and tries to pull a 180 on their friendship.
programme.sub-title: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part II
programme.desc: As the Duel Board battle between Leo, Luna and the mystery duelist continues, Leo soon realizes that their mysterious opponent is actually an all-too-familiar friend.
programme.sub-title: Dawn of the Duel Board: Part II

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack and Crow set out to find a restless Yusei - hoping to ease his mind and reinforce the friendship they share by Turbo Dueling down memory lane.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Super Genius
programme.desc: A mysterious amnesiac helps Yusei build a new engine program for his Runner, but before they can test it out, a make-up-wearing, noodle-eating crook runs off with the file.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Get With the Program: Part I
programme.desc: Yusei and the gang trail Lazar to the local mall hoping to reacquire the engine design program that this window-shopping, noodle-eating crook stole from them.
programme.sub-title: Get With the Program: Part I

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Get With the Program: Part II
programme.desc: Yusei and Lazar are trapped in a warehouse where their only chance of escaping is if Yusei can outduel a Guard Bot whose CPU has been uploaded with all of Yusei's battle techniques.
programme.sub-title: Get With the Program: Part II

programme.title: School for Scoundrels
programme.desc: A young guy short on luck enrolls in a class to build confidence to help win over the girl of his dreams, which becomes complicated when his teacher has the same agenda.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a brilliant mother and daughter con team who have their gift down to a fine art.

programme.title: Benjamin
programme.desc: A family calls in an intervention for Benjamin, a kid who they think is under the influence. Soon, it becomes clear that those who are confronting Benjamin's problems are much more dysfunctional than he is.

programme.title: The Chaperone
programme.desc: Ray’s been asked to chaperone a school trip with his daughter Sally’s class. When characters from Ray’s criminal past believe he stole the loot from a bank they robbed, Ray will do whatever it takes to keep his daughter and her class out of harms way.

programme.title: The Steal
programme.desc: When villainous London bankers plunder desperately-needed money from the Third World, a female computer hacker is hired to get it back. A tale of kidnapping, computer fraud and Morris Minors.

programme.title: Struck By Lightning
programme.desc: Carson Phillips is put in charge of publishing a school paper, but his fellow students aren't so keen to help. When he discovers a lot of the popular kids are keeping secrets, he decides to blackmail them in to helping him - what could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: How to Murder a Millionaire
programme.desc: Spoiled Beverly Hills housewife Irma Summers is convinced that her husband plans to kill her. She escapes from her mansion with an enterprising con-woman, and the pair soon finds themselves up to their elbows in action, intrigue, and misadventures.

programme.title: Sweet Talker
programme.desc: A sweet-talking con man (Bryan Brown) starts to turn his life around when he falls in love in this family-oriented comedy.

programme.title: You May Not Kiss the Bride
programme.desc: Bryan is a quiet, photographer but when he falls foul of local gangsters, he is forced to marry the boss's daughter, Masha, in order for her to get her green card. They are sent to a remote tropical island for a honeymoon that is far from idyllic.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: Depp, Paltrow, and McGregor star in this globe-trotting comedy about an unlikely team recruited to find a stolen, priceless painting.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation into Astley Green Colliery Museum and attempts to make further contact with the souls and spirits who have lost their lives there. Will he succeed?
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Oswestry to investigate claims of hauntings at a castle thousands of years old, and believed to be haunted by an angry judge. Will any of the souls that departed here come out to play?
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the castle and attempts to make contact with the spirit world. It appears he is not alone.
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: 14 Ghosts of The Bate Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to Macclesfield, Cheshire to investigate a building said to be haunted by 14 ghosts and also the lost soul of a witch. With so many spirits in one of the oldest public houses in the UK, will any of the ghosts join him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Middleton, Manchester to investigate claims that a sad cavalier named Edward is haunting this location. Ring O Bells has also been used for druid rituals. Will he be able to summon any spirits tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 2
programme.desc: As Sean continues his investigation at The Ring O Bells pub, he finds that out that there is more haunting this location, than just the spirits lurking behind the bar.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean investigates one of the UK's most haunted pubs, with is very own dungeon. Haunted by multiple spirits, it appears to be very active and Sean is not prepared for what happens to Paul.
programme.sub-title: Ghostly Dimension at Ye Olde Boars Head

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Ashton-Under-Lyne to investigate poltergeist activity claims in a local pub. It's believed that it's not just the locals that return to haunt here. Sean comes face to face with the activity in a night he will never forget.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at The Station Hotel and it appears his presence is not welcomed by the spirits. This is one experience of the paranormal that leaves a mark in Sean's memory forever.
programme.sub-title: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to a haunted escape room attraction and although the sets are dressed to scare, something more sinister seems to be lurking here. Will Sean escape unscathed tonight?
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the escape rooms and investigates the haunted bible and radio. Prepare for a fright when Sean and Paul join forces and witness paranormal activity firsthand
programme.sub-title: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill
programme.desc: Sean heads into Stockport, Greater Manchester and travels to Welkin Mill. He investigates claims of paranormal activity which also appear to be linked to his previous investigation of Moviescape.
programme.sub-title: Spirits in command at Welkin Mill

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stockport to investigate a haunted mill, which has a lift with a mind all of its own. Will any of the ghosts haunting the mill join him on the investigation tonight or will it all go pear shaped?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the mill and is attacked by a spirit. Jane joins the investigation with surprising results. Will it have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Will it All Go Pear Shaped at Pear Mill? - Pear 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean enters one of the UK's most haunted escape rooms and it appears that he is not the only one trying to escape. Will the spirits play games with him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: House of Fear
programme.desc: Located in Gran Canaria, there is one house that locals refuse to enter and that is, The House of Fear. Ghostly shadows, loud banging and demonic voices have all been reported here and the Ghost Dimension team will investigate these claims tonight.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lock Keepers Haunting at Lock 91
programme.desc: Sean heads to Manchester to investigate a lock keeper's cottage that was built in 1804. It appears that the spirits are still watching over the building and terrifying its customers.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties on the Isle of Sheppy, in Plymouth and Reading.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a building plot in Sutton in Ashfield, a semi detached house in Southampton and a static mobile home in a retirement community in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit houses in Derby, Kent and Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a two bedroom bungalow in Preston, a hammer-horror in Chatham and a three bed house in South Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 18
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a property in Stoke-on Trent with a tiny kitchen, a block of bedsits in London and revisit a 400 year old listed house in Wiltshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Devon, Eastbourne and Enfield.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Cornwall, North London and Merseyside.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Essex, Devon and Croydon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 24
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a terrace house close to the river in London. In Malmesbury, Wiltshire there's part of a garden up for grabs with outline planning permission for a bungalow.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a farm house in Cheshire with space galore, in Margate there's a Georgian town house with hidden treasures and in Derbyshire there's a newly refurbished semi.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Derbyshire, Trowbridge and North London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 30
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander & Martin Roberts visit a building in Harrogate with bags of potential and a jaw dropping history, a unique piece of land in Ashbourne and finally a 3 bedroomed house in Plymouth, Devon with a slippery past.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 4
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Stoke, in Stelling Minnis outside Canterbury there's a priceless plot that's a real bargain and in Derby a large semi-detached that has creepy problems.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a period house in Cheshire, a house in Kent and revisit a plot of land in Cheshire that we first saw at auction two years ago.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a detached house in Devon, a property in Kent and a flat in Brighton.

programme.title: Psycho Cop
programme.desc: Six college students on their weekend vacation are humiliated and killed one by one by a psycho cop.

programme.title: Naked Vengeance
programme.desc: A beautiful woman seeks revenge for the tragedy forced upon her family.

programme.title: Small Time Crooks
programme.desc: A loser of a crook and his wife strike it rich when a botched bank job's cover business becomes a spectacular success. Starring: Woody Allen, Tracey Ullman, Hugh Grant, Michael Rapaport, Tony Darrow, Laurine Towler

programme.title: Summer of Fear
programme.desc: A teenage girl's life is turned upside down after her cousin moves into her house, and as time goes by she begins to suspect that she may be a practitioner of witchcraft.

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Shock
programme.desc: A psychologically distraught woman is committed to a private sanitarium by the man she witnessed commit a murder.

programme.title: D.O.A.
programme.desc: Frank Bigelow, told he's been poisoned and has only a few days to live, tries to find out who killed him and why.

programme.title: Perfect People
programme.desc: After many years of marriage, Ken and Barbara decide to radically change their way of living. In order to become more attractive, they submit themselves to modern diets, exercise, and plastic surgery.

programme.title: Androcles And The Lion
programme.desc: Based on George Bernard Shaw's Roman satire about a Christian tailor's fortuitous friendship with a wild lion.

programme.title: Summer of Fear
programme.desc: A teenage girl's life is turned upside down after her cousin moves into her house, and as time goes by she begins to suspect that she may be a practitioner of witchcraft.

programme.title: Hunter: High Noon in L.A.
programme.desc: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Hunter: From San Francisco with Love
programme.desc: A beautiful San Francisco police detective aids Hunter and McCall in solving a series of puzzling murders apparently connected to the estate of a deceased millionaire.

programme.title: Hunter: True Confessions
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.

programme.title: Hunter: Love, Hate and Shorty James
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall try to protect their informant, Sporty James, from his own greed after he blackmails a ruthless cocaine dealer who's responsible for a murder.

programme.title: Hunter: The Contract
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist who wants to control their methods of rescuing his abducted wife.

programme.title: Hunter: The Cradle Will Rock
programme.desc: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.

programme.title: Hunter: Bad Company
programme.desc: The malicious leader of a group of paramilitary neo-Nazis takes Hunter and McCall captive while the group plans their next attack.

programme.title: Hunter: Down and Under
programme.desc: Hunter travels to Australia to help solve a murder case involving a former girlfriend who has been missing for three years.

programme.title: Hunter: Straight to the Heart
programme.desc: Hunter's vacation is shattered when he falls in love with a beautiful professional killer who's connected to an arson scheme he's investigating.

programme.title: Hunter: Requiem for Sgt McCall
programme.desc: McCall lands in hot water when she reopens the case her husband was working on when he was killed.

programme.title: Hunter: Double Exposure
programme.desc: Sergeant McCall poses as a fashion model to expose a burglary ring preying on wealthy businessmen. Guest Starring: George Clooney

programme.title: Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall pose as husband and wife to investigate the murder of a young girl whose death exposes a Soviet plot to relocate secret agents in the United States.

programme.title: Hunter: Any Second Now
programme.desc: A concert pianist is paralyzed by fear when a man jailed for her attempted murder is released from prison and vows to complete the task.

programme.title: Hunter: Shades
programme.desc: When Hunter disappears during an investigation of organized crime, McCall and her new partner must find him before he's killed.

programme.title: Hunter: A Child is Born
programme.desc: A rock musician helps Hunter search for the assailant of a pregnant woman being kept alive artificially until doctors can deliver the child, which Sergeant McCall decides to adopt.

programme.title: Hunter: Crossfire
programme.desc: McCall fears that Hunter's temper will outweigh his judgement when his former girlfriend is murdered and Hunter thinks he knows the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Pursuit - Part 1
programme.desc: While investigating a murder, McCall is shot and paralyzed after learning about a prostitution ring operating along the highway in a fleet of motor homes.

programme.title: Hunter: Hot Pursuit - Part 2
programme.desc: As doctors prepare to operate on the paralyzed McCall, Hunter races against time to exonerate himself and find whoever is killing potential witnesses in a deadly prostitution case.

programme.title: Hunter: Playing God
programme.desc: After learning the circumstances leading up to the murder of a notorious Latino crime boss, Hunter and McCall face an ethical dilemma: whether to arrest the killer or let him go free.

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to LA to check out the latest car trend to take the USA – restomodding. It's the art of sympathetically restoring classic cars to modern standards, while retaining their original charm – and Tiff's behind the wheel of LA's best examples

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell host a battle of the best cheap hot hatches on sale. The Ford Fiesta ST, RenaultSport Clio and Peugeot 208 GTI are all thrashed to the limit before Tiff and Jason reveal the champion.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell is joined by German petrolhead legend and Queen of the Nurburgring Sabine Schmitz. They're finding the ultimate machine for thrill seekers, pitting the latest Caterham 7 against its hardcore rivals from Morgan and Ariel.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato celebrate the 100th anniversary of Aston Martin. Jason drives James Bond's DB5 from Skyfall and learns from the the master craftsmen at the company's heritage centre, while Tiff tests the brand new Rapide S four door supercar

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is in Sweden testing the brand new Volvo S60 Polestar super saloon against its racing car cousin – the competition car of double Swedish Touring Car Champion Fredrick Ekblom.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 9
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson enters the brutal world of professional truck racing. She drives a 1100bhp truck herself, before heading to the Nurburgring where she joins the pit crew of former champion, German Jochen Hahn.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell are joined by Ayrton Senna's nephew, Bruno Senna, to conduct their fastest ever track test. They hold a thrilling race between the brand new Porsche 911 Turbo S and two supercar rivals from Noble and Nissan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 11
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson heads to the German HQ of the Dakar rally winning Mini X-Raid team, to experience the three toughest jobs in motorsport. She'll learn how to be a navigator, mechanic and driver before taking on Dakar rally legend Nani Roma

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 12
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes behind-the-scenes at America's biggest motor race, the Indy 500. He hears what makes the event so special from triple winner Dario Franchitti, reveals the technical differences between F1 cars and Indy cars

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 13
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato hold a track battle between two executive cars with over 1000bhp between them. The brand new Audi RS6 and Mercedes E63 AMG are both designed to demolish autobahns

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 14
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson learns the skills needed to drive in the Special Forces, from former Royal Marine sniper Aldo Kane.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 15
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to Le Mans, to race in the European version of legendary American race series NASCAR – the world's most popular motorsport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 16
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is in France, experiencing the action packed world of Rallycross; a cross between rallying and circuit racing, where 650bhp machines battle door to door.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 17
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell pit three petrolhead icons against brand new, mainstream cars to find out if the classics we lust after are now outclassed by modern machines.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 18
programme.desc: In this special rally themed show, Jason Plato and Tiff Needell swap race track for rally stage as they learn to master the art of rally driving. They're taught advanced driving skills by triple British Rally Champion Mark Higgins

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the opening show of the new series Jason Plato and Tiff Needell put two tyre shredding saloons against one another other on the track - the Mercedes AMG C63 S and Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Fifth Gear presenter Jonny Smith is granted access-all-areas to Kia's top secret test facility in the Californian desert where he investigates the lengths manufacturers go to in the quest for ever greater reliability.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by former F1 driver Karun Chandhok as they pit a Honda Civic Type-R, a Seat Leon Cupra-R, a Renault Megane RS and a Audi S3 against one another to see who will be crowned king of the hot-hatches in an all-new Deathmatch

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Jonny Smith battle the elements to find out if a caravan or a camper van is the ultimate way to experience the great outdoors. Elsewhere in the show, the team hit the local supermarket to find out about the new Dacia Duste

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jonny Smith and Vicki Butler-Henderson review two mighty 4x4's in one of the shows muddiest Dog Fights. Elsewhere, the team hit the road in the all-new Alpine A110 to find out what's changed since the first incarnation hit our streets back in 1961.r

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: These women burn madly with anger so deep they'll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn on the ones they love? Find out as we explore the reasons for a lover's revenge.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sins of the Sister
programme.desc: A sisterly bond can mean a life full of friendship and sibling love. But for some women, having a sister means nothing more then having their own personal meal ticket, scapegoat and combatant. These types of relationships can lead to deadly outcomes.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives. These women all had a fatal fixation.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Every day, teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and slammed bedroom doors. Some daughters won’t take "no" for an answer, and these girls become deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Kids
programme.desc: For many parents, their children's teen years can be one big headache. But when typical teenage rebellion turns into deadly rage, a parent's love may not be enough to save their life.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPERNATURAL ABILITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at supernatural abilities including exceptional endurance in fire-walking and the festival of penitence, telepathy, shamans, mysterious recoveries from illness, clairvoyance.

programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at paranormal activities including apparitions and ghosts, the dark day mystery, Marian Apparitions, curses, warnings from beyond, spontaneous combustion.
