programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Rules
programme.desc: Itʼs “back to basics” for 15 Division when Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides itʼs time for his officers to get back on track

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Every Man
programme.desc: A seasonʼs worth of trials and tribulations come to a head during a frenzied night at the station when the distracted rookies improperly search a prisoner

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A young man (Taylor Lautner) must run for his life soon after learning that the folks who raised him are not his real parents.

programme.title: Rememory
programme.desc: An amateur sleuth steals a machine that can extract, record and play the memories of another person. He uses the device to try and solve the mysterious death of the man who invented it.

programme.title: Held Up
programme.desc: Yuppie Alex (Jamie Foxx) stops for gas at a remote convenience store, gets dumped by his fiancee (Nia Long) and becomes a hostage during a robbery.

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: An irresistible attraction leads to a blossoming romance between a feisty medical student (Teresa Palmer) and her new neighbor (Benjamin Walker).

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: Hoping to get support from his mother (Naomi Watts) and grandmother (Susan Sarandon), a New York teen (Elle Fanning) prepares to transition from female to male.

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: An irresistible attraction leads to a blossoming romance between a feisty medical student (Teresa Palmer) and her new neighbor (Benjamin Walker).

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: Hoping to get support from his mother (Naomi Watts) and grandmother (Susan Sarandon), a New York teen (Elle Fanning) prepares to transition from female to male.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Homecoming
programme.desc: Will's trip to Liberia turns bad when he suffers a head trauma from an attack. The trauma brings up powerful memories about his mothers death and the inadequacies of his father. Magnus deals with be-winged scam artist.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Icebreaker
programme.desc: Henry and Declan lead a team to rescue a crew of a Russian icebreaker and the abnormal passengers

programme.title: Sanctuary: Fugue
programme.desc: FBI Agent Abby Corrigan's life is endangered after she is suddenly attacked by an unfamiliar abnormal during an investigation. Magnus and Will's heated debate over the best way to help Abby threatens to permanently alter their relationship

programme.title: Sanctuary: Chimera
programme.desc: There is a sentient organic nanite causing havoc in the computer system in the Sanctuary. Magnus and Tesla connect their minds to the system in an effort to isolate the nanite. They find Adam Worth instead

programme.title: Sanctuary: Acolyte
programme.desc: A radical group of abnormal beings plan a terrorist attack with the goal of starting a war between surface dwellers and hollow Earth inhabitants. To Magnus' disbelief, Addison, at the NSA, has proof of Biggie's leadership of the group.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team embarks on a mission to locate and capture a powerful super-mutant who possesses god-like powers.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Jesse is forced to reconnect with his former fiancée when the Mutant X team learns that her company is involved in the genetic manipulation of crops.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A mutant who has the ability to interphase with any computer with his mind, who is paralyzed after an encounter with the team, takes over Sanctuary's computers.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team learns about Lexa's estranged twin brother when he becomes the main target of an underground operation harvesting mutant organs.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Brennan and the Mutant X team join forces with a time-traveling mutant to diffuse a bomb threatening devastating consequences.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: While Brennan and Shalimar investigate a mysterious plane crash, Lexa contemplates her future with the Mutant X team.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Forge of Creation
programme.desc: Lili, Vorjak, and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth. Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons. Augur is on the run from volunteers, but sends a friend (Juliet) to help Liam while he's gone.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: First Breath
programme.desc: A college friend of Renee's resurfaces and leads them on an investigation of the link between the Taelons and a biomedical facility's cloning operation.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A Senator's daughter is found to have kryss in her system. Liam and Renee suspect the Taelons lied about synthesizing it and there is a new location for production. They believe Federov is involved. Da'an is addicted to kryss.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Limbo
programme.desc: The Taelons lend some of their dwindling core energy to Joshua Doors for a pilot cold fusion project, but the energy is stolen, leaving the Taelons vulnerable. Jonathan Doors lives on as an AI in cyberspace.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Motherlode
programme.desc: Augur is caught and placed in a special prison where he is placed in a sensory deprivation chamber. An amoralist gets him out and wants Augur to help him steal the gold Zo'or has on the mothership. When Liam learns of what happened he tries to find Augur.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Take No Prisoners
programme.desc: The ANA negotiate amnesty for all resistance members, Liam tries to convince resistance member Halley Simmons to take the offer. Sandoval uses parasites to make volunteers do suicide missions against the resistance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Second Wave
programme.desc: The Taelons decide to leave Earth when it appears that the Jiridians are invading. Meanwhile, a group of Resistance prisoners saved from the mother ship include several disguised Jiridians who are causing trouble for Liam and Renee.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Essence
programme.desc: Renee's brother has PTSD. In a desperate effort to help him, she agrees to let him undergo special treatment. The treatment removes his emotion. The project is overseen by Sandoval and the emotion they take is given to Da'an.

programme.title: The Lost World: True Spirit
programme.desc: Veronica and Marguerite use a ouija board to communicate with Malone, who Veronica believes is trapped in a spirit realm. However, their attempt may have aroused the spirit of Saros, a dead warlord.

programme.title: UFO Hunters: The Italian Ufologists
programme.desc: Italian researchers explore mass UFO sightings, clipeology, and real testimonies, delving into the history and research methods of ufology.

programme.title: Alien Mind Control: The UFO Enigma
programme.desc: This fascinating documentary offers an unprecedented look at a group of individuals who claim to have had life altering UFO encounters, and discovers the unique psychic abilities they unknowingly share.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
programme.desc: Linda Napolitano's 1989 alien abduction is the abduction case of the century.

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: Confessions Of An Alien Abductee
programme.desc: Chantelle, Marie and Simon are all alien abductees. These ordinary people share their extraordinary stories as they seek help through the curiously named Anomalous Mind Management Abductee Contactee Helpline, or AMMACH.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War: Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: The Hills' Abduction: The Zeta Reticuli Incident
programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Alien Reptilian Legacy
programme.desc: Researchers reveal the presence of a supreme and nefarious interdimensional intelligence that has been manipulating mankind for centuries. Interviews with experiencers and alien abductees expose a sinister agenda behind the alien presence on Earth.

programme.title: Project Serpo
programme.desc: 2005: Ex-agent unveils 3,000-page report on a secret ET exchange mission to planet Serpo

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: From the Mothman to the Reptilians: A Guide to Alien Species
programme.desc: Witnesses from around the world have had close encounters with extraterrestrial races, shaping our imagination and becoming cultural phenomena.

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: In a re-run of the first ever British Grand prix, a rare pre-war race car, the Halford Special, is lined up to compete against a well-preserved Bugatti.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A young racing driver learns how to handle the unique and venerable racing car the Napier-Railton, built in the 1930s. Plus, a race winning Harrier jump-jet, and its pilot, are reunited.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The motorbike team create a new lubrication system to keep a 1930s BSA motorbike running. Plus, a Mini Metro and red Corvette turn heads at the Members Classic Car Show.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A rare Brooklands glider is given a new chance at flight. Plus, a 1930s race team is pushed to the max at Goodwood.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway continue to uncover the mysteries of the London Underground by exploring the disused Jubilee line areas of Charing Cross station and its new claim to fame as a film location.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Did giants once inhabit the Earth? Jamie Theakston travels to Sardinia to investigate reports of enormous skeletons being found in a network of caves.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie investigates the High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem and how they hid sacred items from the Romans. He also looks at whether the Dead Sea Scrolls reveal the location of hidden wonders.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The magic and mystery of alchemy is revealed as Jamie Theakston meets a `potion maker' and hears about London's alchemic roots from author Joy Hancox.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston looks into the contentious theory that Jesus was married with children and his bloodline lives on today.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston decodes history's most intriguing riddles. Petra was the capital of the Nabataean kingdom and now he wants to look for riches that may lie hidden in the tombs beneath it.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Can Jamie Theakston solve history's most enduring mystery? Visiting Glastonbury, Wales, Valencia and NYC, he inspects four goblets that could be the Holy Grail itself.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston sheds light on the ultra-secretive Rosicrucian Order, whose members included Leonardo Da Vinci and Isaac Newton. Are they the real-life 'illuminati'?

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston journeys to Greece and Italy to hear the truth about oracles. These mysterious figures - such as the one at Delphi - reputedly spoke the word of the gods.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The startling truth behind historical legends. Jamie Theakston investigates the curious claim that the Nazis were engaged in building flying saucers during World War II.

programme.desc: Jamie Theakston brings to light the life and work of enigmatic inventor Nikola Tesla. Conspiracy theorists believe that the Serb was hushed up - but why?

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Hard-working ambulance crews help a young woman who fell down a flight of stairs and a shivering pensioner with possible sepsis, as well as a sparky 95-year-old who's had a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: On shift with West Midlands Ambulance Service who treat a young lad with a fever, a golf-loving pensioner with a heart problem and a woman convinced she has lung cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: An asthmatic deteriorates rapidly in the ambulance, and the crews are called to a 30-year-old car that's been driven into a wall by a 90-year-old driver.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a young mum with severe stomach pains, take a breathless pensioner to hospital and attend an elderly lady with dementia whose nose will not stop bleeding.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Dudley crews attend a man with heart failure and sepsis, as well as a transgender patient who's in a lot of pain from an old injury. In Stoke, a patient has a panic attack in the ambulance.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews are kept busy attending a man with a swollen leg, a fisherman having a stroke and a teenager whose chest pains turn out to be something totally unexpected.

programme.desc: South Central paramedics race to a newborn baby with a low temperature, while crews in Oxford and Portsmouth deal with a man vomiting blood and a patient's mysterious hip pain.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a young mum with severe stomach pains, take a breathless pensioner to hospital and attend an elderly lady with dementia whose nose will not stop bleeding.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 2

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crystal Maze team captain actor Nancy Sorrell leads her fellow adventurers, comedian Jim Moir (AKA: Vic Reeves), reality TV’s Ferne McCann, former cricketer Graeme Swann and comedian Susan Calman, on a wild ride through the 4 zones.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: This gathering of the Crystal Maze is captained by actor Sunetra Sarker as she pilots plucky TV broadcaster Matthew Wright, seasoned politician Anne Widdecombe actor Nikki Sampson and reality TV Hunk Wes Nelson.

programme.desc: Tonight’s celebrity adventurers are Ore Oduba, Vicky Pattison, Alex Brooker, Lydia Bright and Louie Spence.

programme.desc: Gemma Collins – with team mates James “Arg” Argent, legendary TV personality Carol Vorderman, comedian Ellie Taylor and TV presenter Rick Edwards fighting to maintain any sense of decorum and to get a word in edge wise.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 5 - The Derry Girls cast
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade leads team captain Saoirse Monica Jackson and her fellow cast members Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Louisa Harland, Nicola Coughlan and Dylan Llewellyn on a time-travelling adventure to collect those precious crystals.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Final Face-off
programme.desc: Drita struggles to keep calm after discovering Natalie's deceitful ways. Renee decides to throw a party to celebrate her spiritual cleansing and invites all the girls to join.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Reunion (Part 1)
programme.desc: New accusations are thrown and alliances are shifted in part one of the epic two part reunion, hosted by Vivica Fox. Drita, Renee, Ang, Karen, and Natalie sit down for an explosive look back at the past season.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Reunion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Vivica Fox hosts as Nat D joins Drita, Renee, Ang, Karen, and Natalie for part two of the fiery reunion. The cast continues to look back at the past season and the two Philadelphia Natalie's finally come face-to-face to hash out their season long battle.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Mobbed Up Mermaids
programme.desc: After sending the Philly girls packing, the ladies of the original Staten Island crew are finally at peace. But when a new girl threatens to disrupt their newfound tranquility the group is faced with some difficult decisions.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Drita is forced to defend herself when she hears the slanderous allegations from the Mermaid Parade. Karen and her boyfriend Storm face difficult decisions in their tumultuous relationship.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Hamptons Hangover
programme.desc: After Brittany and Marissa's confrontation, the Staten Island girls try to make the most out of their final days in the Hamptons. As Drita finds herself on the outs with her longtime friends, she quickly discovers an alliance with newcomer Brittany.

programme.title: South Park: Eek, A Pen*s!
programme.desc: Eek, A Pen*s! Ms. Garrison wants to become a man again, so whilst she is away Cartman becomes the sub teacher. It's not long before Cartman is teaching innercity kids the fun of cheating! (S12, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Over Logging
programme.desc: Over Logging: Panic reigns as South Park finds that the internet's gone! The Marshes decide to go hunting for the internet in California and end up in an "internet refugee camp". (S12, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Tweek Vs. Craig
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Jakovasaurs
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park: The Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Cat O*gy (Part 1)
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub (Part 2)
programme.desc: Two Guys Naked In A Hot Tub (2): Stan and his parents go to a party at Mr Mackey's but when the boys make a prank phone call to the police they surround the house and are ready to open fire. (S3, E08)
programme.sub-title: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub (Part 2)

programme.title: South Park: Chickenpox
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off the Fatty Foods
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)
programme.sub-title: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off the Fatty Foods

programme.title: South Park: Clubhouses
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More mechanical mayhem as teams of roboteers do battle to become king of the scrap heap.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, the Hypno-Disc competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. The Razer Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat F of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Ron and Panic Attack teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of `Robot Wars', see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat H of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Sting, Loco and Wizard teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of Heat I of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the King Buxton and All Torque teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Another visit behind the scenes of `Robot Wars' series 2, more exclusive footage as access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of the week's competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The remainder of the contenders must handle the hustle through the bustle with the meat and muscle in the first of the semifinals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: To secure one of two places in the grand final, the contenders must crank up their weapons and teamwork.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The grand final hosts an explosive line-up with both the return of reigning champions and some determined newbies.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four robots from Germany, four robots from the UK. The competitors will fight their fellow compatriots for a chance to represent their country in a Germany against UK final to decide which country has the most ferocious machine.
programme.sub-title: The Sixth Wars: UK vs Germany

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More mechanical mayhem as teams of roboteers do battle to become king of the scrap heap.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The second round of heats sees eight new robots join the fight for The Seventh Wars title. Growler is de-muzzled as he rampages through the arena in the four-way melees, no-one is safe.

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door
programme.desc: Victoria Dane was accidently overdosed before an emergency surgery and flat-lined for more than seven minutes. While recovering, she starts to notice unusual occurrences. She fears that she’s opened a door to a paranormal world that can never be shut.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spellbound
programme.desc: Sandra learns her house is haunted. She tries to perform Wiccan ceremonies but opens a portal.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Soldier
programme.desc: An enigmatic photo of her boyfriend’s brother killed in Vietnam entrances Lisa.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In The Attic
programme.desc: The Fox family moves into a large old house in Lowell, Arkansas. Soon after, an angry ghost and demon begin to target the children, in their waking hours and in their dreams. The Fox family turns to a psychic, who confirms their worst nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Forgotten
programme.desc: A family begins renovating their new house, unaware of a ghostly inhabitant that hates change.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Lair
programme.desc: For years, the Cranmer family thought their historic Pittsburgh dream home was haunted by a harmless ghost. But, when the activity grows violent, they fight back with the only weapon they have, prayer; culminating with an exorcism of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge
programme.desc: Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: A Haunting: Shape Of Evil
programme.desc: Jay Yaple persuades his wife that Enfield, CT, is the perfect place for them. After a series of unexplained events, Jay discovers the house has a dark history of mysterious deaths. Anyone who attempts to come to their aid is driven away by the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Inferno
programme.desc: Kim and Craig move into their dream home in rural Bagley, Iowa with Kim’s two young daughters. When an unseen entity attacks the family, Kim and Craig realize they could be dealing with a ghost. They turn to a demonologist to help them reclaim the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies
programme.desc: Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Florida
programme.desc: Ed, Beth and their toddler soon learn they are not alone at their ranch house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Forest
programme.desc: Clara and her family move to rural New York but find that peaceful country life is an illusion.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: Eternal Grief
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into her home in Indiana, Jennifer Patterson receives a warning from a stranger that she is not alone in the house. When she hears strange voices, she begins to wonder if the previous owner, who died in the house, still inhabits it.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes from the Grave
programme.desc: Ron and Nancy learn their house is a way station between life and death.

programme.title: A Haunting: Marked By Evil
programme.desc: When Stephanie Winters rejects the advances of a friend, he steals a piece of her hair and threatens to put a spell on her. Soon after, Stephanie notices strange noises and objects moving on their own. Could Stephanie's friend have conjured a demon?

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Immortal Love
programme.desc: Shortly after Whitney's family moving into their first home, a restless spirit shatters the serenity of their suburban life. Whitney calls in a paranormal team who uncover the truth behind the spirit's tragic death and his intense obsession with Whitney.

programme.desc: The general knowledge quiz show in which four contestants take on the formidable Eggheads, a team of the brainiest quizzers in the UK. Can anyone beat the ultimate champions?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader
programme.desc: Leonardo cannot take the pressure of being the leader of the Turtles anymore and leaves. Meanwhile, Krang and Shredder use their Solar Siphon to drain all the energy from the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Four Musketurtles
programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cowabunga Shredhead
programme.desc: With the aid of the Holographic Synthesizer, Shredder creates an exact likeness of Michelangelo and programs it to invade the Turtles' lair and destroy them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Turtle Snatchers
programme.desc: Donatello and Rocksteady are beamed up to a space ship - by little alien, Nikto, six thousand years old, traveling with his parents Klaatu and Barada.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Camera Bugged
programme.desc: The polarisoid, an alien tourist visiting Earth, causes all sorts of commotion with his camera which sucks everything it photos literally inside the camera, including City Hall.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Green with Jealousy
programme.desc: In order to steal nuclear energy from a submarine, Krang creates a love potion which induces lovesickness in all of the Turtles - except Donatello, who does not eat the potion-laced pizza.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of the Fly
programme.desc: Intent on revenge against both the Turtles, Krang and Shredder, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) returns with a bug of a plan. While the Turtles are battling Shredder, the insect tries to exterminate the entire group!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono
programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli, including Splinter's treasured red robe - and holding Happy Hour News' April and Vernon prisoners.
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Hot Kimono

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi, Come Home
programme.desc: Shredder has a hare-brained scheme to turn the rabbit from another dimension, Usagi Yojimbo, into an ally of his and an enemy of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Making of Metalhead
programme.desc: Krang creates Metalhead, an exact robot replica of the Turtles with even more powers, and directs him to destroy the Turtles. Donatello, however, reprograms Metalhead over to the Turtles' side.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead Meets the Rat King
programme.desc: Leatherhead The Cajan gator goes into the sewers in pursuit of the Turtles, and encounters the Rat King, who has stolen a tanker­truck of rat poison which he plans to change into a hypnotic gas.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtle Terminator
programme.desc: Shredder captures Irma and creates an android Irma programmed to destroy the Turtles. The zap-happy robotic Irma causes havoc in the TV newsroom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Great Boldini
programme.desc: Mobster Don Turtelli and his cousin the magician, the Great Baldini, steal the famous Tortellini Emerald.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Missing Map
programme.desc: The Turtles are showing Zach, "the fifth Turtle," and his brother Walt their scrapbook.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Gang's All Here
programme.desc: Michelangelo falls for a Shredder trick and eats a chocolate chip cookie made with anti-mutagen capable of turning him into a human being.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Grybyx
programme.desc: The Neutrinos - Dask, Kala and Zak - are back on Earth in search of Kala's pet Grybyx, a small and cuddly creature that, "mega bizzarro," can turn into a humongous monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mister Ogg Goes to Town
programme.desc: When Krang realizes the Technodrome is running low on liquid nitrogen, its main source of fuel, he discovers that a formula exists in Dimension Z which transmutes crude oil, easily available on Earth, into liquid nitrogen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredderville
programme.desc: Because of all the destruction Shredder causes just trying to get rid of the Turtles, they lament that the world would be a better place had they never existed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bye - Bye Fly!
programme.desc: Plotting revenge, Baxter, who has been turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder whose Technodrome is low in power.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Ripoff
programme.desc: The Technodrome is perilously close to running out of power as it teeters on the edge of a crumbling lava cliff deep within the bowels of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Break-In
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder get the Technodrome rolling again and raise it to the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Blow-Out
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder raise the Technodrome to the surface and seize unlimited energy. The Turtles and the World face their darkest hour.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Plan Six from Outer Space
programme.desc: The Turtles launch the missile from the sewers positioned under the Technodrome. It transports Bebop, Rocksteady, Krang and Shredder back to Dimension X but explodes on impact; they survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles of the Jungle
programme.desc: Donatello's idol, inventor mad-scientist Professor Willard creates the Molecular Intensifier, a machine to control growth of living things.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Toys Around
programme.desc: Michelangelo dreams he's being attacked by Tyranno-toys. He wakes up to hear April announcing the Toy Fair opening. Determined to go, Michelangelo disguises himself as a Turtle toy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Four Turtles and A Baby
programme.desc: The Neutrinos are attacked and their leaders, Zenter and Grizzla, are seized by Krang, Shredder and General Traag.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtlemaniac
programme.desc: Widespread thievery is discovered in the city when Ninja Turtle artifacts are found missing. April and Irma prowl for the pilfering poachers, the investigation leads the reporter to the estate of Monroe Q.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rondo in New York
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Riptide: Requiem For Icarus
programme.desc: Nick reacquaints with an old buddy who he hasn't seen or heard from in five years.

programme.title: Riptide: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: Nick spends his Christmas arranging the funeral of a dead soldier. But when the wrong body is shipped, he and the team quickly uncover the dark circumstances behind his death.

programme.title: Riptide: Lady Killer
programme.desc: Someone in King Harbor is killing young blonde women, and the Riptide Agency's latest client has an idea who it may be.

programme.title: Riptide: A Matter Of Policy
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Nick when he's named as a beneficiary for a large estate. But soon the team realizes that the money may come at a cost.

programme.title: Riptide: The Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: When a millionaire hires the team to find his future wife, they find more than they bargained for, and land in the midst of a mob war.

programme.title: Riptide: The Frankie Kahana Show
programme.desc: While at a lounge listening to a singer from Hawaii, a couple things break up the show, trying to kill the host. Soon, the team is embroiled in a case.

programme.title: Riptide: Smiles We Left Behind
programme.desc: When they go to pick up their dry cleaning, the guys can tell something is upsetting Lucy.

programme.title: Riptide: The Pirate And The Princess
programme.desc: The Riptide crew reunites with Angelo en Giovanna Guirilini as they try to find the lost treasure of captain William Tyson.

programme.title: Riptide: Playing Hardball
programme.desc: A professional baseball team has a drug problem, so Nick and Cody go undercover as players while Murray pretends to be a commentator.

programme.title: Riptide: The Play's The Thing
programme.desc: A string of murders is connected to the search for an undiscovered Shakespeare manuscript and the Riptide agency unhappily teams up with wannabe FBI agent Gloria to find it.

programme.title: Riptide: Dead Men Don't Floss
programme.desc: When an article in a magazine praises Nick for "his" agency, the guys each take a case to see which one is the best detective.

programme.title: Riptide: Chapel Of Glass
programme.desc: As the lieutenant's wedding nears, a case the guys are working on strikes close to home, and may call into question everything she knows.

programme.title: Riptide: If You Can't Beat 'Em, Join 'Em
programme.desc: The Riptide Detective Agency is hired to consult for a new detective television show. The lead actors follow the guys around for over a week while investigating an actual case.

programme.title: Riptide: Echoes
programme.desc: While in a firefight, one of the guys is shot, and the others deal with the repercussions of what had to be done.

programme.title: Riptide: Pilot
programme.desc: Nick Ryder and Cody Allen leave their former employment, taking tourists on trips by helicopter or by boat, and start their own private detective agency.

programme.title: Riptide: Conflict Of Interest
programme.desc: A girl whom Cody dated. runs away from her husband and goes to the boat looking for him. But they're not there but Murray is and he offers to help her.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Electronics Store
programme.desc: Nathan tries to leverage Best Buy's price-matching policy by advertising a deal on TVs that's too good to be true.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Horseback Riding/Man Zone
programme.desc: Nathan makes horseback riding more accessible, develops a line of socially conscious outerwear and creates a place for men to chill out while their girlfriend's shop.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Movement
programme.desc: Nathan devises a way to provide a moving company with free labor.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Sporting Goods Store/Antique Shop
programme.desc: Nathan recruits child athletes for endorsement deals and finds a way to put drunk people's clumsiness to good use.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Smokers Allowed
programme.desc: Nathan works with the owner of a bar to turn her business into an immersive theater experience.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Hotel/Travel Agent
programme.desc: Nathan makes it easier for parents to have sex in a hotel room and finds a way for a travel agent to better serve her aging customers.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Nail Salon/Fun
programme.desc: Nathan discovers a snafu in his plan to offer valet services at a nail salon and embarks on a mission to prove that people enjoy his company.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Hero
programme.desc: Nathan organizes a death-defying stunt in an attempt to turn a regular guy into a national hero.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Nathan For You: A Celebration
programme.desc: Anthony Napoli and Nathan revisit some of the people the show has helped, including a ghost realtor, a teen vandal and a centerfold-turned-private eye.

programme.title: Nathan For You: The Richards Tip
programme.desc: Nathan stages an elaborate stunt to make it seem like comedian Michael Richards left a $10,000 tip at a deli.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Happy Ummaversary
programme.desc: Janet plans to get the Kim family together for their first family dinner in 15 years, but it almost proves too much for Jung and Appa to handle.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thinkin' About Inkin'
programme.desc: Janet considers a new tattoo. Jung and Shannon exchange five-week-iversary gifts. Umma and Appa discover some juicy gossip about Pastor Nina.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Soccer Dad
programme.desc: Appa unwittingly becomes Jung's soccer coach. Umma insists that Janet learn to cook. Shannon forces a birthday party on Stacie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Beacon of Truth
programme.desc: Appa eavesdrops on Gerald and Chelsea getting together to tell a lie to her parents. Appa says that he knows whenever Janet has told a lie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Chammo!
programme.desc: Janet is commissioned to take portraits of Shannon's cats. Umma entrusts Jung to pick Appa up from the dentist, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Which Witch is Which
programme.desc: Umma reevaluates her role as a mother. Appa comes into money and tries to do a good thing with it. Jung and Shannon discover they have different concepts of sexy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: In the Bedroom
programme.desc: Appa and Umma come up with a new sleeping arrangement. Jung pursues a new career and tries to involve Janet. Meanwhile, Shannon and Kimchee discover a new, slightly terrifying side of Terence.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Jung shows Shannon his nurturing side. Chelsea and Gerald get in the way of Janet's summer plans. Appa is invited to lead a business seminar but is forced to share the spotlight.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Knife Strife
programme.desc: Umma believes she has discovered a murder weapon. Janet realizes she and Nathan have nothing in common. At Handy, Kimchee struggles to fit in with the other regional managers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Bon Voyage
programme.desc: Appa and Umma's plans for the future push Appa out of his comfort zone. Janet gets an internship overseas while Jung and Kimchee explore new living arrangements.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa reaps the benefits of Umma's accessible parking pass. Janet embraces a new ambition. Meanwhile, Shannon and Jung spice up their long-distance romance.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Channouncements
programme.desc: A local celebrity takes over Umma's announcement duties at church. Appa takes issue with Janet's journaling. Shannon allows shorts in the office.

programme.title: Mr. D: Exam Week
programme.desc: It’s exam time at Xavier Academy and Gerry is convinced that he will catch a few students who are known to cheat on their exams.

programme.title: Mr. D: Bully Awareness Week
programme.desc: Gerry commits himself to making a video presentation for Bully Awareness Week and finds himself with little time to deliver, while Robert is torn over how he will proceed with a new relationship.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Dance
programme.desc: Gerry organizes a dance fundraiser to cover some costs for the girls basketball team, while Robert reveals to Lisa that he had a dream about Trudy which has made him uncomfortable around her.

programme.title: Mr. D: Job Opportunity
programme.desc: When a job opens up in the phys ed department, Gerry sees his chance at his dream job. Meanwhile, Lisa is assigned a student teacher from hell – who happens to be Callaghan’s niece.

programme.title: Mr. D: Guest Speaker
programme.desc: Gerry needs to find a guest speaker for Career Day. Dwyer supposedly has a good one, and Gerry wants to outdo him. Robert has a fraternity reunion this weekend, and he wants to avoid catching the sickness that’s going around at all costs.

programme.title: Mr. D: Quiz Cup
programme.desc: As Lisa takes over the school’s Quiz Cup academic team and attempts to get them successfully through their upcoming tournament, Bobbi is uncomfortably trying to guide her grade 5’s through their health unit.

programme.title: Mr. D: Field Trip
programme.desc: Gerry has to help Bobbi supervise her Grade 5/6 field trip to the museum, while Jeff and Robert cover his classes back at Xavier.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Basketball Diaries
programme.desc: Gerry is desperate for his first win of the basketball season, but when he finds out his opponents are coached by his ex and her husband, he becomes emotionally involved.

programme.title: Mr. D: Charity Day
programme.desc: Gerry decides to use a boxing match at the school’s annual Charity Day to settle his competition with Mr. Dwyer for the title of Mr. D once and for all.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry's Evaluation
programme.desc: When Gerry is evaluated by a member of the board, he must go out of his way to prove that he is great at his job, or risk severe punishment.

programme.title: Mr. D: Late Shift
programme.desc: Gerry takes a second job at Barrels to pay for a new car but struggles to juggle both.

programme.title: Mr. D: World Religions
programme.desc: Gerry's 'World Religions' unit goes off course when he brings his personal views into the classroom.

programme.title: Mr. D: Overnight Trip
programme.desc: Gerry concocts a scheme to get his class to go to Boston so that he and Bill can watch a Celtics game.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Crush
programme.desc: Gerry develops a crush on the Scottish mother of one of his most annoying students.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Other Woman
programme.desc: When Bobbi and her long-term boyfriend Craig break up again, Gerry is there for the rebound... Craig's rebound.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Date
programme.desc: When Bobbi and her long-term boyfriend Craig break up again, Gerry is there for the rebound... Craig's rebound.

programme.title: Law & Order: Prisoner of Love
programme.desc: The death of a controversial artist reveals that he was involved in twisted sex games.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: A U.S. rendition flight crash-lands in rural Quebec, and ICS must recapture three terrorists before the Americans forcibly intervene.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: ICS Director Kessler and U.S. Agent LaGarda clash with disgruntled ex-Airborne soldiers and an elusive arms dealer while hunting for stolen military weapons.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Major Kessler releases an illegal Russian stripper as a political favour, sparking a scandal that climaxes in murder.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: When Gray and Layla bust a human-trafficking operation, they follow a grisly trail to an old adversary.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Friends & Lovers
programme.desc: A young man is found naked and dead in the desert.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Who Are You?
programme.desc: Department protocol is violated when Catherine investigates her ex-husband's rape accusation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anonymous
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his bathtub with a tape recording saying he has committed suicide. Grisson, Catherine and Sara investigate the case that becomes more complicated when Grisson's fingerprint is found at the scene crime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A home invasion at an upscale address leads to a massive first response call that brings out the training officers in full force. After the scene is cleared, Andy and Traci remain behind with the terrified homeowner.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: Andy’s romance with Det. Luke Callaghan gets complicated when he chooses her for a special assignment -serving a search warrant for a bullet lodged in the head of a witness to murder.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Hot & Bothered
programme.desc: A severe heat wave wreaks havoc on the city, forcing the rookies to work around the clock to keep the peace. In the midst of the chaos, Andy discovers that a serial rapist may have resurfaced to prey on vulnerable teenage girls.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Honour Roll
programme.desc: After their High School Outreach assignment goes awry, Andy and Chris stumble on the victim of avicious beating behind a nightclub.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girlfriend of the Year
programme.desc: After a routine speed trap leads to a messy accident on a city highway, Chris and Gail find one of the cars mysteriously empty and quickly realize that itslicense plate matches the one being broadcast in a citywide “Amber Alert”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Big Nickel
programme.desc: Andy’s attempt to avoid Swarek is thwarted whenbothare assigned to a prisoner transport. When things go awry and theinmate breaks loose, the two officers are led on a cat-and-mouse foot chase through the meandering woods.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: What was to be a routine day for Andy is abruptly put on holdwhen herex-copper father, Tommy, confesses that he might have committed a serious crime during one of his alcohol-induced blackouts

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Judgment Day
programme.desc: There’s a nervous tension in the air on Judgment Day for all therookies at 15 Division who will have to undergo make-or-break assessments by Staff Sergeant Frank.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Butterflies
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a fresh-faced university student is killed in a random shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Who Are You?
programme.desc: Department protocol is violated when Catherine investigates her ex-husband's rape accusation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anonymous
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his bathtub with a tape recording saying he has committed suicide. Grisson, Catherine and Sara investigate the case that becomes more complicated when Grisson's fingerprint is found at the scene crime.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Dillian Whyte (28-3) sought a return to winning ways on his boxing comeback, taking on American puncher Jermaime Franklin.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: It's Snowing In Newcastle
programme.desc: Abbie and Adam struggle with their friendship and Nathan feels let down by Chloe who puts Sam first. Faith finally feels like she's one of the gang and Scott takes the crew Tank driving! (S18, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Benidorm Bound
programme.desc: The Geordies try Burlesque dancing and invite their friends over for a games night. Anna sends them to Benidorm and the squad tear up the Strip but Sophie hits Sam after he calls her out. (S18, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Nana Joins The Gang
programme.desc: Sophie apologises for hitting Sam and the Geordies have a hilarious day out at a water park. The crew go clubbing with Abbie's Nana - exactly what they need to bring the family together. (S18, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Double Return
programme.desc: Sophie is lost for words when Aussie Alex makes a surprise visit. The house is proper buzzing when Holly returns and takes them to Newcastle Pride for much needed fun, drinking and dancing! (S18, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly Gets A Shock
programme.desc: Chloe takes Sam on a date that leaves a chill up his spine. Alex has to do some serious grovelling with Sophie, and Scotty T makes life awkward for Holly when he brings her ex on a job. (S18, ep9)

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Hope Swinimer rescues, rehabilitates and releases thousands of animals while struggling to make ends meet.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Burella family daughters are having a hard time choosing which puppy they want, so mom makes the decision for them.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Armstrong family are looking for a puppy; mother and daughter like different dogs.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Mike and Kian are looking for a puppy to symbolize a fresh start after a tragic house fire.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Bier family is looking for their first puppy for their three young daughters.

programme.title: Vet on the Hill
programme.desc: Australian vet Dr. Scott Miller works in his bustling clinic in London.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Dr James treats an arboreal lizard, the great angelfish; Shane's patient is a rhomboid python.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Dr James' dad takes in Lucy, an injured star mermaid; Dr Kiara treats a wild anteater pig.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: A bald eagle needs Hope's help; a small but lethal patient keep the entire staff on their toes.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A tiny puppy is brought into SASH with a deadly disease that could spread quickly.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A look back at some of the most extreme cases that Dr. Chris, Lisa, and their teams have ever dealt with.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Preparations for Hope's open house are derailed when a patient goes missing; the event may be too successful for its own good.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Hope tries to stop the outbreak from spreading; decisions to save Hope for Wildlife.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: A look at the care, cleaning and feeding of the animals; a patient refuses to leave.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Hope says goodbye to two celebrated patients; the grim reality of wildlife rehabilitation.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife

programme.title: White Hot: A Sandra Brown Mystery
programme.desc: When her younger brother dies, Sayre breaks a vow and returns to her home in Louisiana. She gets drawn back into the web of her father, and when the police determine that her brother was murdered, Sayre must battle her family to get justice.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered for Christmas
programme.desc: Postal detectives delay their own travel plans to help a little girl who wrote an urgent letter to God.

programme.title: The Many Trials of One Jane Doe
programme.desc: A victim (Wendy Crewson) of a serial rapist endures a legal battle against the Toronto Police Department.

programme.title: White Hot: A Sandra Brown Mystery
programme.desc: When her younger brother dies, Sayre breaks a vow and returns to her home in Louisiana. She gets drawn back into the web of her father, and when the police determine that her brother was murdered, Sayre must battle her family to get justice.

programme.title: Holidaze
programme.desc: A corporate workaholic (Jennie Garth) wakes up in an alternate universe, married to her childhood sweetheart (Cameron Mathison).

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered for Christmas
programme.desc: Postal detectives delay their own travel plans to help a little girl who wrote an urgent letter to God.

programme.title: The Kennedys: After Camelot
programme.desc: Chappaquiddick damage control continues as Ted eyes the presidency; JFK Jr. struggles with expectations; Jackie holds the family together; Ted falls deeper into depression when his son becomes ill; the legacy of Camelot ends with the death of JFK Jr.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: A man is charged with assaulting the fathers of boys who bullied his daughter; a homeless intellectual defends himself.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: A young criminal lawyer is thrown into the justice system.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
